clauses.statement: High-risk and boundary-sensitive changes plan targeted validation and surface-specific advisory preflight before expensive verification.

test_refs.case: high-risk plan schedules one canonical aggregate boundary preflight before expensive verification

clauses.statement: Preflight records are advisory_preflight and never satisfy final review; freeze requires targeted validation plus passed or fully dispositioned preflight.

test_refs.case: advisory preflight never satisfies final review and freeze waits for its disposition
freeze rejects nonterminal or unknown preflight dispositions

clauses.statement: Expensive verification is reusable only for the exact frozen HEAD, test fingerprint, and command, including evidence imported from CI.

test_refs.case: expensive verification is reused only at the exact frozen binding
import-ci public path records frozen node test coverage from realistic CI checks

clauses.statement: Mutation invalidates only affected phases when the surface is known, while source, test, repository-control, other, and unknown surfaces invalidate all phases with a recorded reason.

test_refs.case: mutation invalidates scoped phases and unknown surfaces fail closed

clauses.statement: The workflow state transition matrix covers early boundary finding, repair and freeze, exact reuse, scoped invalidation, unknown fallback, CI-imported expensive evidence, and current-head final review.

test_refs.case: AC-9 S-001 acceptance matrix executes without failures

diagrams.rationale: Defines the guarded order from targeted_validation through preflight_review and code_frozen to expensive_verification and final_review, including mutation rollback and the current-head boundary.
diagrams.mermaid:
stateDiagram-v2
  targeted_validation --> preflight_review
  preflight_review --> code_frozen: pass or dispositioned
  code_frozen --> expensive_verification
  expensive_verification --> final_review
  final_review --> [*]: current HEAD
  code_frozen --> targeted_validation: source test repo-control unknown mutation
  final_review --> preflight_review: contract mutation

diagrams.rationale: A persisted light plan is untrusted when current classification changes. Reconciliation replaces drifted risk inputs and invalidates prior phases before the Gate evaluates readiness.
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  C[current_change_risk] --> R[reconciled_validation_state]
  P[persisted_validation_plan] --> R
  R -->|risk drift invalidates all phases| G[validation_sequencing_gate]
  P -. cannot bypass current risk .-> G
